summary: Large hsd_3AA7 baselib memory-card decomp PR. It replaced multiple hsd_3AA7 placeholders and rough casts with typed CardState/CardCmd/CardOpStatus-oriented code, expanded CardState in the header, updated prototypes and callers in lbcardnew.c and hsd_3A94.c, and produced bot-reported text progress including 3 new matches and 15 improved unmatched hsd_3AA7 functions.

key_files.role: Primary decomp target; large implementation and cleanup of hsd_3AA7 memory-card command/queue functions, including hsd_803AAA48 and many related fn_803A*/fn_803B* routines.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: hsd_3AA7.c +2686/-296, 32 hunks
raw_diff: hsd_3AA7.c includes hsd_3B2B.h, adds CardOpStatus/CardCmd/HsdCmdEntry, adds CMD_QUEUE, rewrites fn_803AA790, implements hsd_803AAA48
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: bot reports main/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3AA7 matches/improvements

key_files.role: Header/type surface updated for recovered CardState layout and function signatures.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: hsd_3AA7.h +30/-24, 3 hunks

raw_diff hsd_3AA7.h: removes struct hsd_803AC3E0_arg0_t, includes dolphin/card.h, expands CardState with CARDFileInfo/CARDStat/icon fields/digest, changes hsd_803AAA48 to s32(void), updates hsd_803AC3E0/hsd_803AC558/fn_803AC634/fn_803AC6B8/fn_803AD16C/fn_803ADF90/fn_803AE7F8/fn_803B0E9C prototypes

evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: lbcardnew.c +2/-3, 1 hunk
raw_diff: lb_8001C4A8 calls hsd_803AC3E0((struct CardState*) ctx, ...)

key_files.role: Caller adjusted from temporary hsd_803AC3E0_arg0_t cast to CardState cast.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: hsd_3A94.c +1/-2, 1 hunk
raw_diff: hsd_803A949C calls hsd_803AC558((CardState*) state, ((u8*) block) + 0x13)

what_changed: Implemented or substantially rewrote hsd_3AA7.c routines in the memory-card command pipeline, replacing a placeholder for hsd_803AAA48 with C source and changing many queue/status operations to use local structs and fields.
Added local helper types CardOpStatus, CardCmd, HsdCmdEntry and CMD_QUEUE in hsd_3AA7.c to express command queues and operation status instead of raw address/offset arithmetic in the shown hunks.
Reworked fn_803AA790 to index CardQueueEntry directly, use switch cases for sub-state dispatch, and call callback function pointers directly from entry->x14 after NULL checks.
Expanded CardState in hsd_3AA7.h with concrete fields including CARDFileInfo, CARDStat, x170/x270 arrays, icon_format, icon_speed, digest, and other offsets.
Removed the partial struct hsd_803AC3E0_arg0_t from the header and updated prototypes/callers to use CardState where the recovered type supports it.
Bot report for GALE01 shows matched code +0.03% and +1340 bytes, with new 100% matches for fn_803AC3F8, hsd_803B2550, and fn_803AA790, plus 15 hsd_3AA7 unmatched-item improvements.
smart_moves: Updated the owning header prototypes alongside body recovery, reducing mismatched or UNK-style function surfaces.
Replaced a temporary partial CardState-like struct with the canonical CardState in both the header and external callers, aligning call sites with recovered type information.
Used small local structs for command/status entries to make repeated queue accesses more readable and less offset-driven.
Converted repeated retry loops around CARD APIs into bounded for loops, matching the natural repeated pattern visible in the diff.
Grouped sub-state dispatch in fn_803AA790 as a switch with adjacent cases 1 and 2 sharing the fn_803AF3F0 path.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a temporary partial struct is superseded by a fuller recovered type, update the header and all immediate callers to the real type rather than preserving the old cast name.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hsd_3AA7.h: removes hsd_803AC3E0_arg0_t and updates hsd_803AC3E0/hsd_803AC558/fn_803AC634/fn_803AC6B8 prototypes to CardState
raw_diff lbcardnew.c: hsd_803AC3E0 cast changed to struct CardState*
raw_diff hsd_3A94.c: hsd_803AC558 cast changed to CardState*

decomp_lessons.lesson: For queue-like memory regions, a narrow local entry struct plus indexed array access can replace byte-pointer arithmetic while preserving the same layout intent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hsd_3AA7.c: entry = &((CardQueueEntry*) &hsd_804D2348)[hsd_804D7990]
raw_diff hsd_3AA7.c: adds HsdCmdEntry and CMD_QUEUE(base)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered bodies should drive prototype cleanup: hsd_803AAA48 and fn_803AD16C changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures after implementation evidence appeared in the PR.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hsd_3AA7.c: hsd_803AAA48 implemented as s32 hsd_803AAA48(void)
raw_diff hsd_3AA7.h: hsd_803AAA48 changed to s32(void), fn_803AD16C changed to s32(CardState* state)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Bounded retry loops around CARD operations use for (retries = 0; retries < 10; retries++) with break on result != -1.
